chunks.title: Instructions for the Passover and Unleavened Bread
chunks.reason: Contains Yahweh's direct commands to Moses and Aaron regarding the timing, selection, preparation, and consumption of the Passover lamb and the Feast of Unleavened Bread.

chunks.title: Moses Instructs the Elders and Execution
chunks.reason: Describes Moses relaying the instructions to the elders, the people's obedience in preparing the lamb, and the execution of the plague.

chunks.title: The Plague and Pharaoh's Decree
chunks.reason: Narrates the striking of the firstborn at midnight, Pharaoh's reaction, his command for Israel to leave, and the Egyptians pressing them out.

chunks.title: The Departure from Egypt
chunks.reason: Details the journey from Rameses to Succoth, the departure with livestock and a mixed multitude, and the historical note on the 430-year sojourn.

chunks.title: Statutes for the Passover Celebration
chunks.reason: Concludes with further regulations regarding who may eat the Passover, specific rules for foreigners and slaves, and a final summary of the people's obedience.
